dublinCore.dc:title: 119 S4367 IS: Hot Rotisserie Chicken Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

form.current-chamber: IN THE SENATE OF THE UNITED STATES

action.action-desc: Mr. Justice (for himself, Mrs. Capito, Mr. Bennet, and Mr. Fetterman) introduced the following bill; which was read twice and referred to the Committee on Agriculture, Nutrition, and Forestry

form.official-title: To amend the Food and Nutrition Act of 2008 to modify the definition of food.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Hot Rotisserie Chicken Act.
Section 3(k)(1) of the Food and Nutrition Act of 2008 (7 U.S.C. 2012(k)(1)) is amended—

paragraph.text: by inserting hot rotisserie chicken and before those authorized;
by striking clauses and inserting paragraphs; and
